facebook.caption:
6,623 reviews. 4.8 stars. And a rooftop bar right on Bãi Trường.

InterContinental Phú Quốc Long Beach Resort hits different when you arrive at the marina and see the scale of it. Beachfront pools, chic suites, multiple dining options, and that rooftop bar drawing crowds every evening.

This is the benchmark resort on the island. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into InterContinental Phú Quốc Long Beach Resort from the marina side. The pool, the beach, the rooftop bar. 6,623 people rated this 4.8 stars and you'll see exactly why in 30 seconds.
